mapper.insert: insert into comp_team_member ( team_id, user_id, user_name, nick_name, join_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{teamId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, sysdate(), '0', #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select id, team_id, user_id, user_name, nick_name, join_time, del_flag from comp_team_member where team_id = #{teamId} and user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
